305: From enduring friendships shall great rewards arise.

306: A rare prize shall be thine. Give thanks to thy retainers.

1305: Set forth beneath the moon and stars. In their guidance fortune lies.

1306: To thy patrons pay visit. Sound profits await thee.

2305: Luck shall be thine among wolves. Claim victories to thy name.

2306: Thou shalt accumulate resources. Mark well the tide.

3305: From small lands great fortunes shall arise.

3306: Rich rewards await in festivals. Attend them with abandon.

4305: The storehouse shall overflow. Make thy peace.

4306: With improvidence shalt thou indulge in fashions.

5305: Thy belongings shall be borne away. Hasten thou home.

5306: Much wilt thou spend at the market. By thine own efforts seek gain.
